## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused on a single change (split unrelated changes into separate PRs)
- [ ] Follows the standards in [`fabric/standards/`](../fabric/standards/)
- [ ] Tests added/updated in `tests/Healthie.Tests.Unit` for any behavior change
- [ ] XML docs added for any new public type or member
- [ ] `dotnet build` and `dotnet test` pass locally
- [ ] No inline `Version=` added to a `.csproj` (versions live in `Directory.Packages.props`)
- [ ] No manual version or changelog bump (release versioning is driven by the `v*` git tag)
